productDisplayName: ADIDAS Men J-RUN III White Sports Shoes
description: Offering lightweight comfort and packed with features, the adidas J-Run III makes for a fabulous running shoe, offering breathable comfort and abrasion resistance mile after mile. For those who love to flaunt a sporty style, this shoe also makes for a great casual wear. Upper Heavily meshed upper for enhanced breathablity and lightweight comfort Synthetic leather overlays with adidas patented 3-Stripes on the midfoot region for enhanced shoe structure Meshed and padded tongue and collar for breathable comfort Central lacing system for a snug, customised Fit Reinforced overlay over heel cup for extra support to the back foot Reinforced overlay over toe box for durability and added protection to the forefoot Recycled mesh lining for instep comfort Padded sockliner for all-day comfort and shock absorption Removable sockliner to accommodate an orthotic Midsole EVA midsole for lightweight comfort and impact protection Outsole TPR outsole with herringbone patterned grooves for absolute grip and traction Shoe care Wipe surface with a damp, clean cloth to remove dust Do not store in direct sunlight
